name: com.sixstringsyn.rpgtoolkit2d
description: A reusable Unity 6 package for building data-driven 2D RPGs with runtime systems, editor tooling, importable samples, tests, and documentation.

samples.description: Lightweight onboarding sample with the recommended first package validation and content-authoring workflow.
Phase 9 tutorial sample with runtime scripts for loading maps, querying zones and blockers, enumerating placed objects, and logging transitions.
